title: litchi chinensis subsp. philippinensis
intro: Litchi chinensis subsp. philippinensis, also known as the Philippine litchi, is a subspecies of the evergreen Litchi chinensis tree, native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Litchi chinensis subsp. philippinensis include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
